# Copilot Configuration

## Purpose
This repository is dedicated to creating a high-quality Terraform provider for Azure actions.

## Guidelines
1. Ensure all code adheres to Terraform and Azure best practices.
2. Enforce secure defaults in all implementations.
3. Include tests for all Terraform actions to validate functionality.
4. Conduct thorough research into the latest official Azure and Terraform documentation to guarantee Terraform actions are fully functional and compatible.
